title: Isolation of Intestinal Organoids from Matrigel for Protein or RNA Extraction
author: rachel.bates Bates

steps.instruction: Intestinal organoids are grown in 30 µL Cultrex® 3-D Culture Matrix™ Reduced Growth Factor Basement Membrane Extract, PathClear® Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #3445-001-01 domes for 240:00:00
Once organoids are large enough for harvest domes are washed three times with ice cold Phosphate Buffered Saline Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #28374 .
Add Cell Recovery solution Corning Catalog #354253 1 mL per well. incubate on ice for 01:00:00 with orbital shaking at 100 rpm, 4 °C, .
Harvest well contents into centrifuge tube. Centrifuge 6000 rpm, °C, 1 minute . Carefully remove supernatant and add 1 mL of 4 °C PBS. Incubate on ice for 00:05:00 .
Centrifuge 6000 rpm, 4 °C, 1 minute . Carefully remove the supernatant and as much solidified matrigel as possible leaving behind organoids. Cell pellet is ready for RNA or protein extraction.
